title: Li Auto Stock Performance After April Deliveries and L9 Livis Launch
text: Li Auto's shares surged 13.0% following positive developments in April 2026. The company delivered 34,085 vehicles that month and announced plans to release first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 28, 2026. A significant catalyst for investors is the imminent launch of the Li Auto L9 Livis. This represents the company's entry into a new product cycle, marking a strategic shift from its traditional extended-range electric vehicle roots toward pure electric models equipped with AI-enabled driving capabilities. The company continues share repurchases under its May 2025 buyback mandate, having acquired 8.52 million shares cumulatively. This capital allocation choice sits alongside the L9 Livis launch as a meaningful short term support for per share metrics. To invest in Li Auto requires confidence that management can successfully pivot from its extended range roots to competitive pure EVs with attractive AI driving features, while managing heavy R&D spend and intense Chinese EV competition. The fair value estimate sits at $22.16, suggesting approximately 11% upside potential.
